name: Herbed White-Bean Dip
recipeIngredient: 15 oz Cannellini beans (white kidney beans), rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the first six ingredients in a food processor and puree until smooth.
2. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Transfer the mixture to a shallow bowl.
- The dip can be prepared up to one day in advance and stored covered in the refrigerator.
- Allow it to stand at room temperature for about 30 minutes before serving.
4. Sprinkle with cayenne pepper and additional oregano, if desired.
Makes approximately 1-1/3 cups.
Per 2-tablespoon serving: calories, 40; fat, 1 g; sodium, 53 mg; cholesterol, 0.
